commerce.trust_paddle: Payment processed by Paddle (merchant of record). You're protected by their buyer protection.
commerce.stacked_note: Applied on top of the current sale.
commerce.discount_error: Could not apply code. Please try again.
commerce.checkout_error: Could not start checkout. Please try again.
login.title: Login
login.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a magic login link.
login.sent_message: We sent a login link to {{email}}.
login.sent_expiry: The link expires in 15 minutes and can only be used once.
login.error_token_invalid: This login link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
login.error_internal: Something went wrong. Please try again.
account.title: Your Account
account.no_licenses: No licenses found. Purchase an app to get started.
account.export_desc: Download a copy of all data associated with your account.
account.delete_desc: This permanently removes your sessions, licenses, device activations, and download tokens. Your order record is anonymised and retained for legal compliance. This action cannot be undone.
account.delete_confirm_label: Type your email address to confirm
success.title: Purchase Complete!
success.no_session: No session found. If you completed a purchase, please check your account.
success.error: We could not retrieve your license yet. Please check your account page or try refreshing.
success.step_1: Download the app if you haven't already
success.step_2: Launch the app and enter your license key when prompted
success.step_3: Manage your license and devices in your account
maintenance.subtitle: We'll be back shortly.
maintenance.sent: Check your email for the login link.
maintenance.title: Under Maintenance
not_found.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
license.download_error: Failed to generate download link. Please try again.
devices.title: Devices ({{count}}/{{max}})
devices.revoke_confirm: Remove this device? The activation slot will be freed.
auth.not_authorized: You are not authorized to view this page.
common.default_description: Buy once, own forever. No subscriptions.
chat.start_desc: Have a question? Start a chat with us.
chat.share_email_confirm: Your email address will be stored unencrypted in the database so the admin can look up your account. It will be permanently deleted when you delete this chat.
chat.delete_confirm: This will permanently delete the entire conversation and any shared email. This cannot be undone.
chat.empty: No messages yet. Send your first message!
chat.banned: You have been blocked from using chat support.
consent.title: Consent Required
consent.description: Before proceeding, please confirm the following:
consent.waiver_text: I expressly agree that the seller begins performing the contract before the withdrawal period expires, and I acknowledge that I thereby lose my right of withdrawal.
error.sidebar_crash: Something went wrong loading the purchase options. Please refresh.
landing.contact_intro: Have a question or want to chat?
landing.projects_empty_body: My projects will appear here soon.
landing.load_error: Content could not be loaded. Please refresh the page.
